chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rights of the Animal Upon Its Owner

text: 2467 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «اِضْرِبُوهَا عَلَى اَلْعِثَارِ وَ لاَ تَضْرِبُوهَا عَلَى اَلنِّفَارِ فَإِنَّهَا تَرَى مَا لاَ تَرَوْنَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2467 - It is narrated that Imam (as) said:
"Strike them for stumbling, but do not strike them for shying away, for they see what you do not see."
